common.confirmation_suppression: This action is irreversible. Are you sure?

eleve.transfert_info: Changes the student's class for one track, during the year. Grades already recorded are kept (they follow the student).
eleve.transfert_champs_requis: School year and destination class are required
eleve.transfert_ok: Student transferred — grades already recorded are kept
eleve.rechercher: Search by name or ID number...
eleve.subtitle: Manage enrolled students
eleve.matricule_auto: The ID number will be generated automatically (format DG-YYYY-NNN).
eleve.confirm_bulk_supprimer: Permanently delete {{count}} student(s)? This action is irreversible and will erase all their data (enrollments, payments, grades, report cards).
eleve.bulk_inscrire_desc: The {{count}} selected students will be enrolled in the same classes.
eleve.portail_desc: Share this link with the student's parent or guardian. The link gives access to grades, payments and absences without requiring a login.
eleve.import_format_desc: sexe: M or F · parent_lien: pere, mere or tuteur · date_naissance: YYYY-MM-DD · lieu_naissance: optional
eleve.carte_lot_desc: 🪪 Generates a multi-page PDF in Evolis Primacy CR80 format (85.6 × 54 mm). A photo is required — students without a photo are flagged.
eleve.qr_err_impossible: Unable to load the QR code
eleve.carte_id_photo: ID card — add a photo first

classe.subtitle: Manage classes and sections
classe.programme_aucune: No subject assigned to this class.
classe.filtrer_eleves: Filter by last name, first name or ID number...
classe.override_periode_hint: Leave "Default" to use the class setting.

matiere.subtitle: Manage FR and AR subjects
matiere.banner_desc: each subject has its own grading range (Max grade / Min grade). Arabic subjects may use a different scale from French subjects (e.g. out of 10 instead of 20). To change a subject's range, click Edit.

note.prof_ajout_only: Add only — grades already entered cannot be changed
note.note_verrouillee: Grade already entered — editing not allowed
note.notes_ignorees: {{count}} grade(s) already recorded were not changed — contact the administration for any correction
note.aucune_note_a_supprimer: No grade recorded for this student
note.confirmer_suppression_selection: Permanently delete {{count}} selected grade(s)? This action is irreversible.
note.confirmer_suppression_tout: Permanently delete all grades for « {{matiere}} » for this class and this term ({{count}} student(s) affected)? This action is irreversible.
note.programme_vide: This class does not have a subject curriculum yet. Go to Classes → Curriculum to assign subjects.
note.tableau_lecture_seule_annuel: Read-only in annual view — choose a term to edit
note.tableau_choisir_classe: Select a year and a class to view the grade grid.
note.tableau_description: This view shows all entered grades and allows direct editing.

domaine.subtitle: Groupings of subjects by Senegalese domains (LC, Maths, ESVS, EPSA…)
domaine.banner_desc: Each subject can be attached to an academic domain. The IEF reports (Performance by domain, Performance grid) depend on it. The codes match the official framework.

annee_scolaire.subtitle: Manage the school's academic years
annee_scolaire.aucune: No school year. Start by creating one.

affectation.aide: Attach the teacher to the classes where they teach (current year). Required for them to enter grades.

bulletin.aucun: Select a class and a term, then generate the report cards
bulletin.aucun_hint: Select a school year and click Load
bulletin.preflight_inclure_non_evaluees: Include non-graded subjects in the average anyway
bulletin.preflight_manquantes_zero: Count missing grades as 0 (penalizes students without a grade)
bulletin.preflight_non_evaluees_hint: Shown on the report card with the mention "Not graded".
bulletin.preflight_warn_sans_notes: Curriculum subjects with no grade entered

evaluation.empty_classe_requise: Select a class to show the assessments

progression.subtitle: Promotion, repetition and transfer decisions
progression.aucune_progression_hint: Click "Generate proposals" to create automatic proposals based on annual averages.
progression.opt_admis: Promoted (moves up to the next class)

rapport.subtitle: Export data as PDF or CSV for your meetings and inspections
rapport.presences_eleves_desc: Absences and late arrivals by class and term
rapport.presences_personnel_desc: Attendance and hours worked per staff member
rapport.resultats_classe_desc: Summary table of results and ranking
rapport.performance_domaine_desc: Scores by academic domain (LC · Maths · ESVS · EPSA) — landscape
rapport.releve_notes_desc: Detailed subject-by-subject table with statistics — landscape
rapport.grille_ief_desc: Official inspection format — overall results + by domain + proposals
rapport.grille_performance_desc: CI-CP / CE1-CE2 / CM1-CM2 — mastery thresholds by domain, breakdown B/G/T
rapport.propositions_fin_desc: T1/T2/T3 comparison and annual averages for the promotion decision — landscape
rapport.charges_personnel_desc: Weekly hours per staff member — aggregated over the school year
rapport.annuel_info: This report aggregates the 3 terms for the end-of-year class council.
rapport.apercu_html_note: HTML preview — very close to the final PDF rendering.

absences.selectionner_classe: Select a class and load the students
absences.err_select_classe: Select a class and a year

pointage.scanner_sub: Scan your QR code to record your attendance
pointage.scanner_intro: Click the button below to start the camera
pointage.scanner_err_cam: Unable to access the camera. Check the permissions.

finance.recu_auto: The receipt number will be generated automatically.
finance.rechercher_nom_matricule: Search by name or ID number…
finance.selection_eleve_montant: Select at least one student and enter an amount
finance.supprimer_confirm: Delete the payment of {{montant}} for {{prenom}} {{nom}}? This action is irreversible.
finance.scanner_carte_eleve_desc: Point the camera at the QR code on the student's school card.
finance.qr_non_eleve: This QR code does not match a student
finance.camera_erreur: Unable to access the camera. Check the permissions.
finance.aucun_reliquat: No outstanding balance — all students are up to date

document.carte_cr80_info: A photo is required to generate this card. To print several cards at once, use the "Generate in batch" button from the Students or Teachers page.
document.rechercher_eleve_ph: Search by name or ID number...
document.doc_ouvert_print: Document opened — use Ctrl+P to print
document.template_reset_confirm: Delete the custom template and revert to the default one?
document.selectionner_type_editer: Select a type to edit its template
document.variables_explication: Templates use {{var}} variables that are replaced automatically on generation.
document.carte_aucune_photo: ⚠ No photo — the preview shows a placeholder. Add a photo to be able to download or print.
document.apercu_html_note: HTML preview — very close to the final PDF rendering. Click Download for the printable PDF.

portail_parent.invalide_msg: This parent portal link is no longer valid. Please contact the school to get a new link.

calendrier.champs_obligatoires: Title, dates and type are required

messagerie.select_conv:
Select a conversation
or create a new one

emploi_du_temps.selectionner_classe: Select a class to show the timetable
emploi_du_temps.tous_champs_obligatoires: All required fields must be filled in

utilisateur.subtitle: Manage user accounts
utilisateur.err_identifiant_nom: Username and last name are required
utilisateur.err_mdp_requis: A password is required for a new user
utilisateur.confirm_supprimer_definitif_msg: PERMANENTLY delete the account "{{id}}"? This action is irreversible.

personnel.subtitle: Manage the school's staff
personnel.poste_placeholder: e.g. Head teacher, Head of discipline…
personnel.carte_lot_desc: 🪪 Generates a double-sided PDF in Evolis Primacy CR80 format for all staff. A photo is required — members without a photo are skipped and listed.
personnel.qr_scan_msg: Scan this code to record your attendance
personnel.qr_confirm_regen: Regenerate {{nom}}'s QR code? The old QR code will stop working.

parametre.bulletin_rendu_desc: Customize the display of PDF report cards (rank, absences, sizes).
parametre.bulletin_afficher_rang_desc: Shows the Rank / ranking column. The ranking is still computed even if hidden.
parametre.bulletin_entete_desc: Official text shown at the top of report cards (Republic, Ministry, IEF…). FR on French report cards, AR on Arabic ones, both on combined.
parametre.etab_desc: This information appears on report cards and official documents
parametre.bareme_desc: Configuration of the school's grading system
parametre.noms_periodes_desc: Customize the names shown on report cards
parametre.langue_theme_desc: Customize the interface to your preferences
parametre.notif_desc: Choose the events for which you want to receive alerts in the app
parametre.notif_paiement_retard_desc: Alert when a student has an unpaid balance
parametre.notif_absences_eleves_desc: Alert when the configured absence threshold is exceeded
parametre.notif_messages_desc: Notification when a new internal message is received
parametre.notif_inscriptions_desc: Notification when a new student is enrolled
parametre.notif_seuils_desc: These thresholds are shared with the academic configuration
parametre.securite_mdp_desc: Use a strong password of at least 8 characters
parametre.securite_sessions_desc: Sign out from all devices in one action. Your current session will also be closed.
parametre.securite_deconnecter_confirm: All your sessions have been revoked. You will be redirected to the login page.
parametre.format_invalide_image: Invalid format — image only (PNG, JPG, SVG…)
parametre.formats_acceptes: PNG, JPG, SVG, WebP — max 512 KB
parametre.jours_cours_desc: Select the days the school is open
parametre.autoriser_toutes_matieres_desc: A teacher can enter grades for all subjects, not only those they teach
parametre.autoriser_toutes_classes_desc: A teacher can enter grades in all classes of the school, not only those they teach
parametre.politique_saisie_notes_modif_active: Editing enabled: teachers can also change existing grades (anti-edit lock lifted)
parametre.fonctions_desc: Catalog of roles available for staff members. Default roles (teacher, principal, …) are protected and cannot be deleted.
parametre.note_securite_compte: To change your password or manage your sessions, go to the {{securite}} tab.
parametre.bareme_info: The mentions scale is defined in the global settings and may change according to the school's regulations. Contact the administrator to change the thresholds.
parametre.seuils_partages: These thresholds are also used in the academic configuration. A change here will be reflected in the Academics tab.

activite.subtitle: Sports, clubs, workshops and other activities
activite.select_seance: Select a session to record attendance
activite.aucun_inscrit_activite: No student enrolled in this activity
activite.supprimer_seance_confirm: Delete this session and its attendance records?
activite.appreciation_placeholder: e.g. Very good participation, remarkable team spirit…

bibliotheque.subtitle: Manage books, loans and returns
bibliotheque.confirm_retour: Record the return of this book?

demande_absence.subtitle: Manage teaching staff leave requests
demande_absence.motif_placeholder: Describe the reason for the absence...
